feedback.text: please consider adding protections aginst video game destruction. curently when you buy a modern aaa game you will often be requided to connect to the developers servers to be able to play at all. this creates a situation that can end up scamming users as the game developers/publichers curently have no requirement to in any way keep that server up or in any was compensate game buyers if servers go down. this means you might buy a game only to have it lost forever at any point. to avoid this and the destruction of games that may have deep sentemental value to people please support the very popular stop killing games movement
